resume_text: Python backend engineer who built AI Interview Copilot with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Streamlit, PDF resume parsing, OpenAI structured outputs, SSE streaming, JWT authentication, and pytest coverage. The project includes RAG-style question reuse with pgvector and explicit guardrails against hallucinated resume claims.
job_description: We need an AI backend engineer who can design REST APIs, build reliable LLM workflows, use PostgreSQL, stream model output to a frontend, write tests, and explain system design tradeoffs for production AI tools.
